payload.actions_taken: ["reran required bootstrap and preserved its authoritative-state refusal","based the correction on exact published candidate dd5648daa0db822f29a90fc47fcfbfce43db4a88 without rewriting published history","recorded GitHub Actions run 29685632567 and Windows job 88189458225 as diagnostic evidence only","replaced the parent PowerShell native pipeline with System.Diagnostics.Process and separately redirected stdout and stderr","encoded the child invocation and supplied path parameters through the child environment for Windows PowerShell 5.1 compatibility","asserted exact empty stdout exact refusal stderr plus platform newline exit code one absent destination state and unchanged artifact and checksum hashes","pinned the exact reviewed CRLF PowerShell refusal test bytes by SHA-256 in the execution-proof verifier","seeded block-comment comment-preserved disabled redirect and loose matching all-stream merge and forced-exit adversaries","ran focused execution provenance workflow release documentation and Phase 6 framework gates without remote mutation"]
payload.decisions_made: ["retain ErrorActionPreference Stop for genuine test-harness failures","avoid direct native invocation and stream merging for the expected installer refusal","use ProcessStartInfo rather than modern PowerShell-only native error controls or ArgumentList APIs so Windows PowerShell 5.1 remains supported","read stdout and stderr asynchronously before waiting to avoid redirected-stream deadlock","bind the entire reviewed PowerShell test byte sequence instead of trusting comment-blind required-string checks","preserve exact refusal output exit one no destination mutation and authenticated input immutability","treat five-platform provenance and six-command execution as diagnostic progress while Windows installer-refusal completion final collection equivalence acceptance and release authority remain blocked"]

payload.harness_friction: The required bootstrap cannot restore the verified core epoch because the pre-existing authoritative state is unavailable. Matrix queries and CLI-authored records remain unavailable, so this child commit preserves that state and supplies a new additive replayable trace without changing published records.
payload.notes: Windows refusal-test harness correction trace. The supplied remote run proves authenticated diagnostic provenance and six-command execution, but the terminating parent test prevented complete Windows installer refusal assertions and final collection. No push, dispatch, main mutation, tag, release, package, publish, production signing, platform acceptance, Phase 7 acceptance, promotion, or Phase 8 action occurred.
